summary: Verified ADR 0155 live on the production Windmill control plane after converging the repo-managed worker checkout and seeded schedule surfaces, confirming the new queued-intent dispatcher script and minute safety schedule are present, enabled, and backed by the deployed worker checkout.

verification.observed: The production converge `make live-apply-service service=windmill env=production` finished on 2026-03-25 with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=149 changed=14 unreachable=0 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=57 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=34 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0`.
A direct authenticated probe to `http://100.64.0.1:8005/api/version` returned `CE v1.662.0` on 2026-03-25.
Windmill workspace `lv3` returned `f/lv3/intent_queue_dispatcher` with summary `ADR 0155 queued intent dispatcher` and runtime `python3`.

A remote probe on `docker-runtime-lv3` confirmed `/srv/proxmox_florin_server/scripts/intent_queue_dispatcher.py` and `/srv/proxmox_florin_server/config/windmill/scripts/intent-queue-dispatcher.py` are present in the deployed checkout.

notes: The implementation commit was pushed to `main` through the audited `SKIP_REMOTE_GATE=1` path after the remote pre-push gate hung on a stale build-server SSH probe; the bypass receipt is committed separately under `receipts/gate-bypasses/20260325T165716Z-codex-adr-0155-main-live-63eb89c-skip-remote-gate.json`.
ADR 0154 lane queueing remains in place; this live apply adds the separate ADR 0155 conflict/workflow-busy dispatcher surfaces on top of the existing Windmill control-plane runtime.
